title: windmitfl county record
description: One file per county in data/counties/. A county page renders only when required fields are real values, not NEEDS_VERIFICATION strings. The generator must skip (and log) counties with unverified required fields. Keys beginning with an underscore are editorial notes for researchers and must never be rendered.

last_verified.description: Rendered on-page; update whenever county data is re-verified

region.description: e.g. South Florida, Tampa Bay, Panhandle

ami_source.description: Source for AMI figures. Use HUD income limits for the county/metro, current FY. Required.

ami_80.description: 80% of county median income threshold (low-income line) in USD. HUD FY figure. String only if NEEDS_VERIFICATION.

ami_120.description: 120% of county median income threshold (moderate-income ceiling) in USD.

windstorm_context.description: County premium context. Source from OIR rate filings and Citizens exposure data. Never invent.

citizens_share_note.description: Citizens Property Insurance presence in this county, if notable

risk_designation.description: Plain-language wind exposure framing for the advisory header, e.g. 'Coastal high wind exposure'. Keep factual, no fear copy.

wind_borne_debris_region.description: Whether the county includes Wind-Borne Debris Region / HVHZ areas (Miami-Dade and Broward are the High-Velocity Hurricane Zone under the FBC). Affects opening-protection requirements.

cities.description: Only cities that get their own page. Omit entirely until city-level data and search-volume justification exist.

inspectors.description: Phase 2: populated by DBPR license scrape. featured=true rows are paid placements.

faq.description: County-localized FAQ. Rendered with FAQPage JSON-LD.
